help.title: Help & Guide
help.add_account_desc: Tap the + button to add a new account. You can scan a QR code using your camera or upload a QR image. You can also enter the secret key manually with advanced settings for algorithm, digits, and step.
help.backup_desc: Go to Settings → Backup & Restore to export your encrypted vault to a file, or import a previously exported vault. The file is encrypted with your password.
help.cloud_desc: Your vault is automatically backed up to the cloud when you sign up or unlock. Sign in with the same email on any device to restore your codes.
help.lock_desc: Use the Lock button in Settings to lock your vault without closing the app. Log Out will clear saved credentials and return to the welcome screen.
help.settings_desc: In Settings you can change the language (English/Arabic), toggle dark/light theme, export/import backups, lock the vault, or log out completely.
